records.m_Talk_ENG: Sis!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sis!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sis!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, Solovey.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, Solovey.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, Solovey.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry. I nearly caught that C.O., but I let my guard down and missed her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry. I nearly caught that C.O., but I let my guard down and missed her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry. I nearly caught that C.O., but I let my guard down and missed her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What about you, Sis? Are you not hurt?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What about you, Sis? Are you not hurt?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What about you, Sis? Are you not hurt?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was ambushed, but I managed to dodge her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was ambushed, but I managed to dodge her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was ambushed, but I managed to dodge her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I couldn't protect the other two, though.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I couldn't protect the other two, though.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I couldn't protect the other two, though.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The other two...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The other two...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The other two...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Annie... and Major Lee were injured by the C.O.'s attack.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Annie... and Major Lee were injured by the C.O.'s attack.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Annie... and Major Lee were injured by the C.O.'s attack.

records.m_Talk_ENG: According to Dr. Olivie, both of them are experiencing CRF loss, just like the other victims.
records.m_Talk_DEU: According to Dr. Olivie, both of them are experiencing CRF loss, just like the other victims.
records.m_Talk_FRA: According to Dr. Olivie, both of them are experiencing CRF loss, just like the other victims.

records.m_Talk_ENG: CRF loss? What's that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: CRF loss? What's that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: CRF loss? What's that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: CRF is the power that a Counter possesses.
records.m_Talk_DEU: CRF is the power that a Counter possesses.
records.m_Talk_FRA: CRF is the power that a Counter possesses.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the Corruption virus that has infested the patient's body is blocking the activation of that CRF.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the Corruption virus that has infested the patient's body is blocking the activation of that CRF.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the Corruption virus that has infested the patient's body is blocking the activation of that CRF.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Experts are working on finding a treatment, but for now, there's no way to recover.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Experts are working on finding a treatment, but for now, there's no way to recover.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Experts are working on finding a treatment, but for now, there's no way to recover.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If they just can't use their power... that means their health should be fine, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If they just can't use their power... that means their health should be fine, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If they just can't use their power... that means their health should be fine, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I think they should be fine since they just can't use their Counter ability...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, I think they should be fine since they just can't use their Counter ability...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I think they should be fine since they just can't use their Counter ability...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But we can't be sure of that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But we can't be sure of that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But we can't be sure of that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If they've turned from Counters into non-Counters, it wouldn't be an issue. But Counters have a higher dependency on CRF compared to non-Counters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If they've turned from Counters into non-Counters, it wouldn't be an issue. But Counters have a higher dependency on CRF compared to non-Counters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If they've turned from Counters into non-Counters, it wouldn't be an issue. But Counters have a higher dependency on CRF compared to non-Counters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The virus has spread throughout their body, and it's impossible to remove it through surgery. On top of that, this virus is getting stronger.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The virus has spread throughout their body, and it's impossible to remove it through surgery. On top of that, this virus is getting stronger.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The virus has spread throughout their body, and it's impossible to remove it through surgery. On top of that, this virus is getting stronger.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Does that mean... their lives are in danger?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Does that mean... their lives are in danger?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Does that mean... their lives are in danger?

records.m_Talk_ENG: At the current rate, it's likely they only have a week at most.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At the current rate, it's likely they only have a week at most.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At the current rate, it's likely they only have a week at most.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even without using CRF, they'll keep losing it until it's completely depleted.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even without using CRF, they'll keep losing it until it's completely depleted.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even without using CRF, they'll keep losing it until it's completely depleted.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Doctor, is there no solution?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Doctor, is there no solution?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Doctor, is there no solution?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're asking about a definite cure, there's none yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're asking about a definite cure, there's none yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're asking about a definite cure, there's none yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But perhaps... there might be another solution, one that isn't a cure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But perhaps... there might be another solution, one that isn't a cure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But perhaps... there might be another solution, one that isn't a cure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is it? Please, tell me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is it? Please, tell me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is it? Please, tell me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: When you subdued her, the virus inside the patients' bodies temporarily stopped its activity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When you subdued her, the virus inside the patients' bodies temporarily stopped its activity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When you subdued her, the virus inside the patients' bodies temporarily stopped its activity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I believe they have some sort of resonant network.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I believe they have some sort of resonant network.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I believe they have some sort of resonant network.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you're saying that the Corruption virus isn't an independent entity?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, you're saying that the Corruption virus isn't an independent entity?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, you're saying that the Corruption virus isn't an independent entity?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, it's just a hypothesis, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, it's just a hypothesis, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, it's just a hypothesis, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: For now, this is the only clue to solving this situation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For now, this is the only clue to solving this situation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For now, this is the only clue to solving this situation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, the solution is...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, the solution is...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, the solution is...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We need to find the colony that's the source of the virus...
records.m_Talk_DEU: We need to find the colony that's the source of the virus...
records.m_Talk_FRA: We need to find the colony that's the source of the virus...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And eradicate it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And eradicate it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And eradicate it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hello, Annie?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hello, Annie?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hello, Annie?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah...! You're...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah...! You're...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah...! You're...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm Solovey.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm Solovey.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm Solovey.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hailey! Where's Hailey?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hailey! Where's Hailey?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hailey! Where's Hailey?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We took her to the hospital.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We took her to the hospital.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We took her to the hospital.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...? That can't be!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...? That can't be!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...? That can't be!

records.m_Talk_ENG: She'd really hate being seen by others... Did you drag her by force?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She'd really hate being seen by others... Did you drag her by force?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She'd really hate being seen by others... Did you drag her by force?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, she asked first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, she asked first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, she asked first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She said that if she stayed there alone, you would worry, Annie.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She said that if she stayed there alone, you would worry, Annie.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She said that if she stayed there alone, you would worry, Annie.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry... and thank you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry... and thank you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry... and thank you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe, of course. It's the right thing to do.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe, of course. It's the right thing to do.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe, of course. It's the right thing to do.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, um.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, um.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, um.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The doctor said I'm sick. Does that mean I'm going to die?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The doctor said I'm sick. Does that mean I'm going to die?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The doctor said I'm sick. Does that mean I'm going to die?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you feeling a lot of pain?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you feeling a lot of pain?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you feeling a lot of pain?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's bearable. Hailey also endured something like this every day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's bearable. Hailey also endured something like this every day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's bearable. Hailey also endured something like this every day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's this...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's this...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's this...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a flower ring.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a flower ring.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a flower ring.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Having this will make you feel at ease.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Having this will make you feel at ease.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Having this will make you feel at ease.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll help you. Even if it hurts now, you'll be fine soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll help you. Even if it hurts now, you'll be fine soon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll help you. Even if it hurts now, you'll be fine soon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you going this far?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you going this far?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you going this far?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I lied to you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I lied to you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I lied to you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I lied and took your money... I have no way to repay you... And I ruined what you were trying to do...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I lied and took your money... I have no way to repay you... And I ruined what you were trying to do...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I lied and took your money... I have no way to repay you... And I ruined what you were trying to do...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you hate me, Annie?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you hate me, Annie?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you hate me, Annie?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why ask that all of a sudden? There's no reason I would hate you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why ask that all of a sudden? There's no reason I would hate you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why ask that all of a sudden? There's no reason I would hate you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then that's enough for me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then that's enough for me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then that's enough for me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We don't hate each other, so there's no reason not to help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We don't hate each other, so there's no reason not to help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We don't hate each other, so there's no reason not to help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if I hated you, I would have helped you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if I hated you, I would have helped you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if I hated you, I would have helped you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought we were similar, Annie.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought we were similar, Annie.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought we were similar, Annie.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm... similar? To you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm... similar? To you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm... similar? To you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know that Hailey found you in the Corrupted Area and brought you back?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you know that Hailey found you in the Corrupted Area and brought you back?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you know that Hailey found you in the Corrupted Area and brought you back?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know. Hailey contracted Corruption Syndrome after that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know. Hailey contracted Corruption Syndrome after that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know. Hailey contracted Corruption Syndrome after that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because she saved and brought someone like me back... Hailey ended up like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because she saved and brought someone like me back... Hailey ended up like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because she saved and brought someone like me back... Hailey ended up like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She said she doesn't regret it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She said she doesn't regret it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She said she doesn't regret it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She doesn't regret bringing you here. And she hopes you'll be happy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She doesn't regret bringing you here. And she hopes you'll be happy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She doesn't regret bringing you here. And she hopes you'll be happy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So let's work hard together.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So let's work hard together.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So let's work hard together.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So that adults can feel at ease and say that they're glad we're happy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So that adults can feel at ease and say that they're glad we're happy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So that adults can feel at ease and say that they're glad we're happy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is it okay if a patient stays out here like this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is it okay if a patient stays out here like this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is it okay if a patient stays out here like this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I got attacked by a C.O. Stupidly, too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I got attacked by a C.O. Stupidly, too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I got attacked by a C.O. Stupidly, too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But everyone's safe, and that's what matters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But everyone's safe, and that's what matters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But everyone's safe, and that's what matters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I saw it. You could've dodged, Major, but you protected that child first, didn't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I saw it. You could've dodged, Major, but you protected that child first, didn't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I saw it. You could've dodged, Major, but you protected that child first, didn't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And now this is the result. Nothing's really been solved.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And now this is the result. Nothing's really been solved.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And now this is the result. Nothing's really been solved.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Protecting someone without hesitation. What more important outcome is there for people like us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Protecting someone without hesitation. What more important outcome is there for people like us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Protecting someone without hesitation. What more important outcome is there for people like us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're just trying to put a good spin on it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're just trying to put a good spin on it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're just trying to put a good spin on it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nice weather, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nice weather, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nice weather, isn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yeah.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yeah.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yeah.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, our poor Major.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, our poor Major.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, our poor Major.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At such a young age, forget about a picnic. How many times have you been stuck in the hospital?
records.m_Talk_DEU: At such a young age, forget about a picnic. How many times have you been stuck in the hospital?
records.m_Talk_FRA: At such a young age, forget about a picnic. How many times have you been stuck in the hospital?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you making fun of me?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you making fun of me?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you making fun of me?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone's scared.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone's scared.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone's scared.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even the strongest police officers start avoiding their duties when their lives are constantly in danger and they keep ending up in the hospital.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even the strongest police officers start avoiding their duties when their lives are constantly in danger and they keep ending up in the hospital.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even the strongest police officers start avoiding their duties when their lives are constantly in danger and they keep ending up in the hospital.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But even after going through all that, Major, you're not planning to give up, are you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But even after going through all that, Major, you're not planning to give up, are you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But even after going through all that, Major, you're not planning to give up, are you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Major, you've done your best.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Major, you've done your best.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Major, you've done your best.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, leave the rest to us and focus on taking care of yourself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, leave the rest to us and focus on taking care of yourself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, leave the rest to us and focus on taking care of yourself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Be careful, Lieutenant Kang.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Be careful, Lieutenant Kang.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Be careful, Lieutenant Kang.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll leave the rest to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll leave the rest to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll leave the rest to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What is it? Please, tell me!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What is it? Please, tell me!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What is it? Please, tell me!

root.m_Talk_ENG: When you subdued her, the virus inside the patients' bodies temporarily stopped its activity.
root.m_Talk_DEU: When you subdued her, the virus inside the patients' bodies temporarily stopped its activity.
root.m_Talk_FRA: When you subdued her, the virus inside the patients' bodies temporarily stopped its activity.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I believe they have some sort of resonant network.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I believe they have some sort of resonant network.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I believe they have some sort of resonant network.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, you're saying that the Corruption virus isn't an independent entity?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, you're saying that the Corruption virus isn't an independent entity?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, you're saying that the Corruption virus isn't an independent entity?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, it's just a hypothesis, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, it's just a hypothesis, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, it's just a hypothesis, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: For now, this is the only clue to solving this situation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For now, this is the only clue to solving this situation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For now, this is the only clue to solving this situation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, the solution is...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, the solution is...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, the solution is...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We need to find the colony that's the source of the virus...
root.m_Talk_DEU: We need to find the colony that's the source of the virus...
root.m_Talk_FRA: We need to find the colony that's the source of the virus...

root.m_Talk_ENG: And eradicate it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And eradicate it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And eradicate it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hello, Annie?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hello, Annie?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hello, Annie?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah...! You're...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah...! You're...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah...! You're...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm Solovey.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm Solovey.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm Solovey.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hailey! Where's Hailey?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hailey! Where's Hailey?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hailey! Where's Hailey?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We took her to the hospital.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We took her to the hospital.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We took her to the hospital.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...? That can't be!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...? That can't be!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...? That can't be!

root.m_Talk_ENG: She'd really hate being seen by others... Did you drag her by force?
root.m_Talk_DEU: She'd really hate being seen by others... Did you drag her by force?
root.m_Talk_FRA: She'd really hate being seen by others... Did you drag her by force?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, she asked first.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, she asked first.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, she asked first.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She said that if she stayed there alone, you would worry, Annie.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She said that if she stayed there alone, you would worry, Annie.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She said that if she stayed there alone, you would worry, Annie.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry... and thank you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry... and thank you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry... and thank you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe, of course. It's the right thing to do.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe, of course. It's the right thing to do.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe, of course. It's the right thing to do.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, um.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, um.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, um.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The doctor said I'm sick. Does that mean I'm going to die?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The doctor said I'm sick. Does that mean I'm going to die?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The doctor said I'm sick. Does that mean I'm going to die?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you feeling a lot of pain?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you feeling a lot of pain?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you feeling a lot of pain?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's bearable. Hailey also endured something like this every day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's bearable. Hailey also endured something like this every day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's bearable. Hailey also endured something like this every day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's this...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's this...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's this...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a flower ring.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's a flower ring.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a flower ring.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Having this will make you feel at ease.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Having this will make you feel at ease.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Having this will make you feel at ease.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll help you. Even if it hurts now, you'll be fine soon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll help you. Even if it hurts now, you'll be fine soon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll help you. Even if it hurts now, you'll be fine soon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you going this far?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you going this far?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you going this far?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I lied to you...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I lied to you...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I lied to you...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I lied and took your money... I have no way to repay you... And I ruined what you were trying to do...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I lied and took your money... I have no way to repay you... And I ruined what you were trying to do...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I lied and took your money... I have no way to repay you... And I ruined what you were trying to do...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you hate me, Annie?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you hate me, Annie?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you hate me, Annie?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why ask that all of a sudden? There's no reason I would hate you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why ask that all of a sudden? There's no reason I would hate you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why ask that all of a sudden? There's no reason I would hate you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then that's enough for me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then that's enough for me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then that's enough for me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We don't hate each other, so there's no reason not to help.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We don't hate each other, so there's no reason not to help.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We don't hate each other, so there's no reason not to help.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if I hated you, I would have helped you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if I hated you, I would have helped you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if I hated you, I would have helped you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought we were similar, Annie.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought we were similar, Annie.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought we were similar, Annie.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm... similar? To you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm... similar? To you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm... similar? To you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know that Hailey found you in the Corrupted Area and brought you back?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you know that Hailey found you in the Corrupted Area and brought you back?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you know that Hailey found you in the Corrupted Area and brought you back?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know. Hailey contracted Corruption Syndrome after that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know. Hailey contracted Corruption Syndrome after that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know. Hailey contracted Corruption Syndrome after that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because she saved and brought someone like me back... Hailey ended up like that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because she saved and brought someone like me back... Hailey ended up like that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because she saved and brought someone like me back... Hailey ended up like that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She said she doesn't regret it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She said she doesn't regret it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She said she doesn't regret it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: She doesn't regret bringing you here. And she hopes you'll be happy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She doesn't regret bringing you here. And she hopes you'll be happy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She doesn't regret bringing you here. And she hopes you'll be happy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So let's work hard together.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So let's work hard together.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So let's work hard together.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So that adults can feel at ease and say that they're glad we're happy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So that adults can feel at ease and say that they're glad we're happy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So that adults can feel at ease and say that they're glad we're happy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is it okay if a patient stays out here like this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is it okay if a patient stays out here like this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is it okay if a patient stays out here like this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I got attacked by a C.O. Stupidly, too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I got attacked by a C.O. Stupidly, too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I got attacked by a C.O. Stupidly, too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But everyone's safe, and that's what matters.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But everyone's safe, and that's what matters.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But everyone's safe, and that's what matters.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I saw it. You could've dodged, Major, but you protected that child first, didn't you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I saw it. You could've dodged, Major, but you protected that child first, didn't you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I saw it. You could've dodged, Major, but you protected that child first, didn't you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: And now this is the result. Nothing's really been solved.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And now this is the result. Nothing's really been solved.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And now this is the result. Nothing's really been solved.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Protecting someone without hesitation. What more important outcome is there for people like us?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Protecting someone without hesitation. What more important outcome is there for people like us?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Protecting someone without hesitation. What more important outcome is there for people like us?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're just trying to put a good spin on it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're just trying to put a good spin on it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're just trying to put a good spin on it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nice weather, isn't it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nice weather, isn't it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nice weather, isn't it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yeah.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yeah.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yeah.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, our poor Major.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, our poor Major.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, our poor Major.

root.m_Talk_ENG: At such a young age, forget about a picnic. How many times have you been stuck in the hospital?
root.m_Talk_DEU: At such a young age, forget about a picnic. How many times have you been stuck in the hospital?
root.m_Talk_FRA: At such a young age, forget about a picnic. How many times have you been stuck in the hospital?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you making fun of me?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you making fun of me?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you making fun of me?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone's scared.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone's scared.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone's scared.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even the strongest police officers start avoiding their duties when their lives are constantly in danger and they keep ending up in the hospital.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even the strongest police officers start avoiding their duties when their lives are constantly in danger and they keep ending up in the hospital.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even the strongest police officers start avoiding their duties when their lives are constantly in danger and they keep ending up in the hospital.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But even after going through all that, Major, you're not planning to give up, are you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But even after going through all that, Major, you're not planning to give up, are you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But even after going through all that, Major, you're not planning to give up, are you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Major, you've done your best.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Major, you've done your best.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Major, you've done your best.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, leave the rest to us and focus on taking care of yourself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, leave the rest to us and focus on taking care of yourself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, leave the rest to us and focus on taking care of yourself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Be careful, Lieutenant Kang.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Be careful, Lieutenant Kang.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Be careful, Lieutenant Kang.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll leave the rest to you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll leave the rest to you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll leave the rest to you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right.
